title: cx Manifest v2
description: On-disk format for a cx bundle manifest (schemaVersion 2). Each section's file list is stored as a {columns, rows} table for compact, schema-stable serialisation.

schemaVersion.description: Manifest schema version. Must be exactly 2.

bundleVersion.description: Bundle format version. Must be exactly 1.

projectName.description: Project name as declared in cx.toml.

sourceRoot.description: Absolute path to the source root at bundle time.

bundleDir.description: Absolute path to the bundle output directory.

checksumFile.description: Filename of the SHA-256 checksum sidecar (relative to bundleDir).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp at which the bundle was created.

cxVersion.description: Version of the cx CLI that produced this manifest.

repomixVersion.description: Version of the Repomix adapter used during bundling.

checksumAlgorithm.description: Algorithm used in the checksum sidecar.

sections.description: Ordered list of text-file sections in the bundle.

assets.description: Raw files copied into the bundle without Repomix rendering.

ManifestSettings.description: Snapshot of the cx configuration settings used to build this bundle.

globalStyle.description: Default Repomix output style for sections.

tokenAlgorithm.description: Token-estimation algorithm stored for downstream consumers.

ListDisplayConfig.description: Color-temperature thresholds and time-palette used by cx list.

timePalette.description: 8–10 ANSI 256 grayscale codes in descending bright-to-dark order.

SectionRecord.description: A rendered text-file section and its file metadata table.

name.description: Section name as declared in cx.toml [sections.<name>].

style.description: Repomix output style used to render this section.

outputFile.description: Filename of the rendered section output (relative to bundleDir).

outputSha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the rendered section output file.

fileCount.description: Number of source files embedded in this section.

FileTable.description: Column-oriented file metadata table. The columns array is always the fixed header; rows holds one positional array per file.

columns.description: Fixed column header. Must equal the canonical order exactly.

rows.description: One row per file. Column values match the columns array by position.

FileRow.description: Positional file-metadata tuple. Indices correspond to FileTable.columns.

prefixItems.title: kind
prefixItems.description: "text" for files embedded in section output; "asset" for raw-copied files.

prefixItems.title: storedIn
prefixItems.description: "packed" when embedded in a section output; "copied" when stored as a raw asset.

prefixItems.title: sha256
prefixItems.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the original source file.

prefixItems.title: sizeBytes
prefixItems.description: Original source file size in bytes.

prefixItems.title: mediaType
prefixItems.description: MIME media type of the source file.

prefixItems.title: outputStartLine
prefixItems.description: First bare content line of the file block in the section output (null when span capture is disabled).

prefixItems.title: outputEndLine
prefixItems.description: Last bare content line of the file block in the section output (null when span capture is disabled).

AssetRecord.description: A raw file copied into the bundle without Repomix rendering.

sourcePath.description: Source-relative path of the original file.

storedPath.description: Path where the file is stored in the bundle (relative to bundleDir).

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file content.

mtime.description: ISO 8601 modification time of the source file.
